title: ‘Build with us’ - Chris Roos & Associates
description: BUSINESS NEWS - When planning to build your...
bodyText:
Advertorial

BUSINESS NEWS - When planning to build your dream home, there's one place to begin: Chris Roos & Associates.

"Start with us," says Adv Chris Roos, who founded the firm 12 years ago.


> Now firmly established in George for almost two years, with additional offices in Knysna and Cape Town, this boutique law practice has become a trusted name in building and engineering law, offering their services across South Africa to the heart of Africa.


Specialising in all aspects of engineering, construction and property law, Chris Roos & Associates provides clear, practical advice that saves clients time, money and stress.

From design and build contracts to estate development agreements, alternative dispute resolution and arbitration, their expertise spans the entire construction cycle.

Their reputation is built on quality, simplicity and fast turnaround.

In fact, all new enquiries are addressed within 48 hours - a rare commitment in the legal world.

What sets the firm apart is its personal touch. Being boutique means flexibility, dedication and solutions tailored to each client's needs.

With over 30 years' collective experience and more than 400 clients on their books, the team offers insights that only specialists in building and engineering law can provide.

Clients value their sharp knowledge of contract conditions and their focus on resolving disputes constructively.


> Accessibility is another hallmark. Understanding that construction issues don't keep office hours,Chris Roos & Associates is available after hours via its dedicated call centre on 087 135 1004.


Whether you're building your first home, managing a development or navigating complex engineering contracts, begin with the experts. With Chris Roos & Associates by your side, you are building with confidence.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
